description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, averaging 58 mins per day. His coding was split mostly across Java, Bash, Python, and Markdown. The data shows activity across 5 projects, but no public GitHub commits, repos, or pull requests were recorded.
